---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Being Solved

What problem does this feature address? What is the user impact?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why is your proposed solution preferred?

## Architectural Notes

Any notes on how this fits the Neur1GenesisMRSC architecture (MRSC+ cycles, Σ-Matrix coherence, PAS streams).

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues or PRs.
